impact: This keeps future `ppd.extraction.fcc_wireless_permit_requirements` proposals narrow by enforcing a small physical-line budget and rejecting dataclass-based generated contract modules before broader validation accepts them.
summary: Add a focused replacement-size guard test for the FCC wireless permit requirements extractor.
target_task: Task checkbox-115: Add a one-file replacement-size guard test for `ppd.extraction.fcc_wireless_permit_requirements` proposals that rejects broad generated modules and requires the extractor implementation to stay under 180 physical lines with no dataclasses.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
